Dear Sir,

Sub: Submission of earnings conference call Transcript 
 
We enclose herewith the transcript of the earnings conference call of Q2 & H1 FY 2023 held on 
November 10, 2022 and the same is also available on the website of the Company at the weblink 
https://www.godeepak.com/financial-result/. 
 
Please take the same on your record. 
 
Thanking you. 
 
Yours faithfully, 
For DEEPAK NITRITE LIMITED 
 
 
 
ARVIND BAJPAI
